description_long: This is a stylized adult figure with an androgynous build, dressed in a formal outfit consisting of a fitted long-sleeve shirt and straight trousers. The shirt features a prominent, large bow or cravat at the neck, adding a touch of elegance to the attire. The figure's hands are open and extended outward, and the shoes are simple and formal, matching the overall sophisticated appearance. The face is angular with large, expressive eyes, and the hair is medium-length, straight, and layered, partially covering the ears and forehead. The overall posture is upright and neutral, suggesting a calm and composed demeanor. The surface of the figure is smooth and matte, with minimal textural detail.
description: A stylized adult in formal attire with a large neck bow, straight trousers, and medium-length layered hair, standing upright with arms extended. The figure has a smooth, matte finish and a composed appearance.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of the head, straight hair, and the fitted back of the shirt and trousers.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the bow at the neck, and the straight posture.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the large neck bow, facial features, and the open hand position.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the profile, straight hair, and formal shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: formal shirt with a large neck bow, straight trousers, and formal shoes
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended outward
